-0.150065,51.2641687.name: Merstham
-0.150065,51.2641687.publicNote: Epic scenery spoiled by the constant drone of the M25.
-0.150065,51.2641687.privateNote:
And too many people.
Lots of cafes though.

-0.193118,51.6975545.name: Potters Bar
-0.193118,51.6975545.publicNote: Almost worthy because of the great and tranquil beauty of Gobions Wood, and it being only 20m from Kings Cross on a quick train. Unfortunately the surrounding fields and busy commuter roads that make up the bulk of the area don’t have enough going for them to put this on the recommendation list.
